ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spaceship variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the spaceship variant */,
  "default_personality" INTEGER /* Default personality assigned to the variant */,
  "acquired_round" INTEGER /* Round when the variant was acquired */,
  "refitted_round" INTEGER /* Round when the variant was last refitted */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the production of the variant started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the production of the variant ended (if applicable) */,
  "total_units_produced" INTEGER /* Total number of units produced for this variant */,
  "current_inventory" INTEGER /* Current number of units in inventory */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the variant (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_refitted_round FOREIGN KEY ("refitted_round") REFERENCES refitting_rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_default_personality FOREIGN KEY ("default_personality") REFERENCES personality_types ("personality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variants_acquired_round FOREIGN KEY ("acquired_round") REFERENCES acquisition_rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personality_types" (
  "personality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personality type */,
  "personality_name" TEXT /* Name of the personality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the personality */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the personality type was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the personality type was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the personality type */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the personality type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acquisition_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acquisition round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the acquisition round started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the acquisition round ended */,
  "total_variants_acquired" INTEGER /* Total number of variants acquired during the round */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the round (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refitting_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refitting round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the round */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the refitting round started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the refitting round ended */,
  "total_variants_refitted" INTEGER /* Total number of variants refitted during the round */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the round (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spaceship variant being modified */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the refitting round when the modification was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the modification (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the modification */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the modification */,
  "completed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who completed the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_modifications_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES refitting_rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_modifications_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spaceship variant being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the variant */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., training, combat) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the usage in hours */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the usage */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the usage */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the usage occurred (e.g., training facility, combat zone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_usage_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pilot, engineer, commander) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs (e.g., engineering, operations) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spaceship variant related to the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., acquisition, refitting, usage) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the log entry (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the log entry */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_logs_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)
